About the clinic

Where Expertise Meets Gentle Care

Romi's Dental Care is a trusted dental practice located in Vanagaram, Chennai. We are committed to delivering high-quality dental treatments in a calm, hygienic, and patient-friendly environment.

From routine check-ups to advanced smile makeovers, our clinic is equipped with modern dental technology to ensure precise, comfortable, and long-lasting results for every patient.

We believe a healthy smile is the foundation of confidence — and we are here to help you achieve it.

Dr. T. Angelin Romi
BDS, FDS Prosthodontics — Dental Surgeon
Reg. No. 30166
What we offer

Comprehensive Dental Care

From prevention to perfection — we cover every aspect of your dental health under one roof.

🦷

General Dentistry

  • Tooth cleaning & polishing
  • Dental fillings
  • Root canal treatment
🔩

Implants & Replacement

  • Dental implants
  • Fixed bridges
  • Partial & full dentures
✨

Cosmetic Dentistry

  • Teeth whitening
  • Smile designing
  • Veneers
😁

Orthodontics (Braces)

  • Metal braces
  • Ceramic braces
  • Aligners
Our work

Smile Transformations

Meet your doctor

Dr. T. Angelin Romi

"Every patient deserves a smile they can be proud of — and we make that happen with care, skill, and heart."

Dr. Romi brings years of dedicated expertise in prosthodontics and general dentistry, committed to making each patient visit comfortable, effective, and truly worthwhile. Her passion for dental excellence is reflected in every smile she crafts.
